```
cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/workspace-explorer/workspace-explorer-service.ts
import type { RecentWorkspaceTarget, RuntimeFileStat } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../workspace/types";
import { detectWorkspaceDocumentKind, getFileName } from "../workspace/workspace-service";
import type { WorkspaceExplorerEntry, WorkspaceExplorerNode, WorkspaceExplorerNodeKind } from "./types";

function getPathSegments(pathname: string): string[] {
  return pathname.split(/[\\/]/).filter(Boolean);
}

export function getParentDirectoryPath(pathname: string): string | null {
  const normalized = pathname.trim();
  if (!normalized) {
    return null;
  }

  const segments = getPathSegments(normalized);
  if (segments.length <= 1) {
    return null;
  }

  const separator = normalized.includes("\\") ? "\\" : "/";
  const prefix = normalized.startsWith("/") ? "/" : "";
  return `${prefix}${segments.slice(0, -1).join(separator)}`;
}

function uniquePaths(paths: Array<string | null | undefined>): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const ordered: string[] = [];

  for (const item of paths) {
    if (!item || seen.has(item)) {
      continue;
    }
    seen.add(item);
    ordered.push(item);
  }

  return ordered;
}

export function buildWorkspaceExplorerRoots(params: {
  documents: WorkspaceDocument[];
  recentTargets: RecentWorkspaceTarget[];
  launchTargetPath: string | null;
}): string[] {
  const documentRoots = params.documents.map((document) => getParentDirectoryPath(document.path));
  const recentRoots = params.recentTargets.map((target) => getParentDirectoryPath(target.path));
  const launchRoot = getParentDirectoryPath(params.launchTargetPath ?? "");

  return uniquePaths([...documentRoots, launchRoot, ...recentRoots]);
}

export function isWorkspaceExplorerDocumentPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(pathname) !== null;
}

function resolveEntryKind(pathname: string, stat: RuntimeFileStat | null): WorkspaceExplorerNodeKind | null {
  const documentKind = detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(pathname);
  if (documentKind) {
    return documentKind;
  }
  if (stat?.isDirectory) {
    return "directory";
  }
  return null;
}

export function createWorkspaceExplorerEntry(pathname: string, stat: RuntimeFileStat | null): WorkspaceExplorerEntry | null {
  const kind = resolveEntryKind(pathname, stat);
  if (!kind) {
    return null;
  }

  return {
    id: pathname,
    path: pathname,
    name: getFileName(pathname),
    kind,
    stat,
  };
}

export function sortWorkspaceExplorerEntries(entries: WorkspaceExplorerEntry[]): WorkspaceExplorerEntry[] {
  return [...entries].sort((left, right) => {
    if (left.kind === "directory" && right.kind !== "directory") {
      return -1;
    }
    if (left.kind !== "directory" && right.kind === "directory") {
      return 1;
    }
    return left.name.localeCompare(right.name, "zh-CN");
  });
}

export function mergeExpandedDirectoryIds(current: string[], roots: string[]): string[] {
  return uniquePaths([...roots, ...current]);
}

function buildDirectoryNode(
  directoryPath: string,
  directoryEntries: Record<string, WorkspaceExplorerEntry[]>,
  expandedIds: Set<string>,
): WorkspaceExplorerNode {
  const children = expandedIds.has(directoryPath)
    ? (directoryEntries[directoryPath] ?? []).map((entry) => buildWorkspaceExplorerNode(entry, directoryEntries, expandedIds))
    : [];

  return {
    id: directoryPath,
    path: directoryPath,
    name: getFileName(directoryPath) || directoryPath,
    kind: "directory",
    children,
    expandable: true,
  };
}

function buildWorkspaceExplorerNode(
  entry: WorkspaceExplorerEntry,
  directoryEntries: Record<string, WorkspaceExplorerEntry[]>,
  expandedIds: Set<string>,
): WorkspaceExplorerNode {
  if (entry.kind === "directory") {
    return buildDirectoryNode(entry.path, directoryEntries, expandedIds);
  }

  return {
    id: entry.id,
    path: entry.path,
    name: entry.name,
    kind: entry.kind,
    children: [],
    expandable: false,
  };
}

export function buildWorkspaceExplorerTree(params: {
  roots: string[];
  directoryEntries: Record<string, WorkspaceExplorerEntry[]>;
  expandedIds: string[];
}): WorkspaceExplorerNode[] {
  const expandedSet = new Set(params.expandedIds);
  return params.roots.map((root) => buildDirectoryNode(root, params.directoryEntries, expandedSet));
}
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/workspace-explorer-context.ts
import { createContext, useContext } from "react";
import type { WorkspaceExplorerNode } from "../../domains/workspace-explorer/types";

export interface WorkspaceExplorerContextValue {
  tree: WorkspaceExplorerNode[];
  roots: string[];
  expandedIds: string[];
  selectedId: string | null;
  loading: boolean;
  busy: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  setExpandedIds(nextExpandedIds: string[]): Promise<void>;
  selectNode(nodeId: string | null): Promise<void>;
  refresh(): Promise<void>;
}

export const WorkspaceExplorerContext = createContext<WorkspaceExplorerContextValue | null>(null);

export function useWorkspaceExplorer() {
  const context = useContext(WorkspaceExplorerContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error("useWorkspaceExplorer must be used within WorkspaceExplorerProvider.");
  }
  return context;
}

cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/WorkspaceExplorerProvider.tsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "./editor-runtime-context";
import { useWorkspaceSession } from "./workspace-session-context";
import { WorkspaceExplorerContext } from "./workspace-explorer-context";
import {
  buildWorkspaceExplorerRoots,
  buildWorkspaceExplorerTree,
  createWorkspaceExplorerEntry,
  isWorkspaceExplorerDocumentPath,
  mergeExpandedDirectoryIds,
  sortWorkspaceExplorerEntries,
} from "../../domains/workspace-explorer/workspace-explorer-service";
import type { WorkspaceExplorerEntry } from "../../domains/workspace-explorer/types";
import { createEditorRouteService } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
import { getLaunchTargetPath } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";

interface WorkspaceExplorerProviderProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
    return (error as { message: string }).message;
  }
  return "工作区资源树加载失败";
}

export function WorkspaceExplorerProvider({ children }: WorkspaceExplorerProviderProps) {
  const { snapshot } = useEditorRuntime();
  const { documents, recentTargets, activeDocument, openDocument } = useWorkspaceSession();
  const routeService = useMemo(
    () => (snapshot?.runtimeMode === "host" ? createEditorRouteService(snapshot.client) : null),
    [snapshot],
  );
  const [roots, setRoots] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [expandedIds, setExpandedIdsState] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [directoryEntries, setDirectoryEntries] = useState<Record<string, WorkspaceExplorerEntry[]>>({});
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [busyPaths, setBusyPaths] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const ensureDirectoryLoaded = useCallback(
    async (directoryPath: string, force = false) => {
      if (!routeService) {
        return;
      }
      if (!force && directoryEntries[directoryPath]) {
        return;
      }

      setBusyPaths((current) => (current.includes(directoryPath) ? current : [...current, directoryPath]));
      try {
        const entries = await routeService.listFiles(directoryPath);
        const stats = await Promise.all(entries.map(async (entryPath) => ({ path: entryPath, stat: await routeService.statFile(entryPath) })));
        const explorerEntries = sortWorkspaceExplorerEntries(
          stats
            .map(({ path, stat }) => createWorkspaceExplorerEntry(path, stat))
            .filter((entry): entry is WorkspaceExplorerEntry => entry !== null),
        );
        setDirectoryEntries((current) => ({
          ...current,
          [directoryPath]: explorerEntries,
        }));
      } catch (runtimeError) {
        setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
      } finally {
        setBusyPaths((current) => current.filter((item) => item !== directoryPath));
      }
    },
    [directoryEntries, routeService],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    const launchTargetPath = snapshot ? getLaunchTargetPath(snapshot) : null;
    const nextRoots = buildWorkspaceExplorerRoots({
      documents,
      recentTargets,
      launchTargetPath,
    });

    setRoots(nextRoots);
    setExpandedIdsState((current) => mergeExpandedDirectoryIds(current, nextRoots));

    if (!routeService || nextRoots.length === 0) {
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    let cancelled = false;

    const bootstrap = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);
      try {
        await Promise.all(nextRoots.map((root) => ensureDirectoryLoaded(root)));
      } catch (runtimeError) {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
        }
      } finally {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setLoading(false);
        }
      }
    };

    void bootstrap();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [documents, ensureDirectoryLoaded, recentTargets, routeService, snapshot]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activeDocument) {
      return;
    }
    setSelectedId(activeDocument.path);
  }, [activeDocument]);

  const setExpandedIds = useCallback(
    async (nextExpandedIds: string[]) => {
      const mergedExpandedIds = mergeExpandedDirectoryIds(nextExpandedIds, roots);
      setExpandedIdsState(mergedExpandedIds);
      if (!routeService) {
        return;
      }
      const directoriesToLoad = mergedExpandedIds.filter((directoryPath) => !directoryEntries[directoryPath]);
      if (directoriesToLoad.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      setError(null);
      await Promise.all(directoriesToLoad.map((directoryPath) => ensureDirectoryLoaded(directoryPath)));
    },
    [directoryEntries, ensureDirectoryLoaded, roots, routeService],
  );

  const selectNode = useCallback(
    async (nodeId: string | null) => {
      setSelectedId(nodeId);
      if (!nodeId) {
        return;
      }
      if (isWorkspaceExplorerDocumentPath(nodeId)) {
        await openDocument(nodeId);
      }
    },
    [openDocument],
  );

  const refresh = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!routeService || roots.length === 0) {
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const directoriesToRefresh = Array.from(new Set([...roots, ...expandedIds]));
      await Promise.all(directoriesToRefresh.map((directoryPath) => ensureDirectoryLoaded(directoryPath, true)));
    } catch (runtimeError) {
      setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [ensureDirectoryLoaded, expandedIds, roots, routeService]);

  const tree = useMemo(
    () =>
      buildWorkspaceExplorerTree({
        roots,
        directoryEntries,
        expandedIds,
      }),
    [directoryEntries, expandedIds, roots],
  );

  const value = useMemo(
    () => ({
      tree,
      roots,
      expandedIds,
      selectedId,
      loading,
      busy: busyPaths.length > 0,
      error,
      setExpandedIds,
      selectNode,
      refresh,
    }),
    [tree, roots, expandedIds, selectedId, loading, busyPaths.length, error, setExpandedIds, selectNode, refresh],
  );

  return <WorkspaceExplorerContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</WorkspaceExplorerContext.Provider>;
}
EOF

export function LayoutSettingsPanel() {
  const { snapshot, busyAction, setLayoutMode } = useEditorRuntime();
  const translate = useEditorTranslation(snapshot?.locale);

  if (!snapshot) {
    return null;
  }

  const options: Array<{ value: EditorLayoutMode; label: string }> = [
    { value: "workbench", label: translate("editingEngine.layout.workbench") },
    { value: "infinite-canvas", label: translate("editingEngine.layout.infiniteCanvas") },
  ];

  return (
    <ChipsCardShell title={translate("editingEngine.settings.categories.layout.title")}> 
      <div className="settings-center__panel-stack">
        <p>{translate("editingEngine.settings.categories.layout.description")}</p>
        <ChipsRadioGroup
          value={snapshot.preferredLayout}
          disabled={busyAction === "layout"}
          options={options}
          onValueChange={(value) => {
            void setLayoutMode(value as EditorLayoutMode);
          }}
        />
        <div className="settings-center__note-list">
          <div>
            <strong>{translate("editingEngine.layout.workbench")}</strong>
            <span>{translate("editingEngine.layoutDescriptions.workbench")}</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <strong>{translate("editingEngine.layout.infiniteCanvas")}</strong>
            <span>{translate("editingEngine.layoutDescriptions.infiniteCanvas")}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ChipsCardShell>
  );
}

cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/settings/SettingsCenter.tsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { ChipsTabs } from "@chips/component-library";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
import { useEditorTranslation } from "../../shared/runtime/use-editor-translation";
import { getBuiltinSettingsPanelDefinitions } from "./settings-registry";
import "./settings-center.css";

export function SettingsCenter() {
  const { snapshot } = useEditorRuntime();
  const translate = useEditorTranslation(snapshot?.locale);
  const panelDefinitions = useMemo(() => getBuiltinSettingsPanelDefinitions(), []);
  const [activePanelId, setActivePanelId] = useState(panelDefinitions[0]?.category.id ?? "workspace");

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!panelDefinitions.some((panel) => panel.category.id === activePanelId)) {
      setActivePanelId(panelDefinitions[0]?.category.id ?? "workspace");
    }
  }, [activePanelId, panelDefinitions]);

  return (
    <ChipsTabs
      orientation="vertical"
      value={activePanelId}
      onValueChange={setActivePanelId}
      items={panelDefinitions.map((panel) => ({
        value: panel.category.id,
        label: (
          <div className="settings-center__tab-label">
            <strong>{translate(panel.category.labelKey)}</strong>
            <span>{translate(panel.category.descriptionKey)}</span>
          </div>
        ),
        content: <panel.component />,
      }))}
    />
  );
}

import React, { useMemo } from "react";
import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState, ChipsLoadingBoundary, ChipsTree, type TreeNode } from "@chips/component-library";
import { useWorkspaceExplorer } from "../../app/providers/workspace-explorer-context";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
import { useEditorTranslation } from "../../shared/runtime/use-editor-translation";
import type { WorkspaceExplorerNode } from "../../domains/workspace-explorer/types";
import "./workspace-explorer.css";

function getExplorerIcon(kind: WorkspaceExplorerNode["kind"]): string {
  if (kind === "directory") {
    return "F";
  }
  if (kind === "box") {
    return "B";
  }
  return "C";
}

function createTreeNode(node: WorkspaceExplorerNode): TreeNode {
  return {
    id: node.id,
    label: (
      <div className="workspace-explorer__tree-label">
        <span className="workspace-explorer__tree-title">
          <strong>{getExplorerIcon(node.kind)}</strong>
          <span>{node.name}</span>
        </span>
        <span className="workspace-explorer__tree-path">{node.path}</span>
      </div>
    ),
    children: node.children.map(createTreeNode),
  };
}

export function WorkspaceExplorerPanel() {
  const { snapshot } = useEditorRuntime();
  const { tree, expandedIds, selectedId, loading, busy, error, setExpandedIds, selectNode, refresh } = useWorkspaceExplorer();
  const translate = useEditorTranslation(snapshot?.locale);

  const nodes = useMemo(() => tree.map(createTreeNode), [tree]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="editor-shell__section-header">
        <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.workspaceExplorer")}</h2>
        <div className="editor-shell__button-row">
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" disabled={busy} onPress={() => void refresh()}>
            {translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshExplorer")}
          </ChipsButton>
        </div>
      </div>
      {error ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{error}</p> : null}
      {nodes.length === 0 ? (
        <ChipsEmptyState
          ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.sections.workspaceExplorer")}
          title={translate("editingEngine.workspaceExplorer.emptyTitle")}
          description={translate("editingEngine.workspaceExplorer.emptyDescription")}
        />
      ) : (
        <ChipsLoadingBoundary loading={loading} delayMs={0} loadingText={translate("editingEngine.workspaceExplorer.loading")}> 
          <ChipsTree
            ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.sections.workspaceExplorer")}
            nodes={nodes}
            expandedIds={expandedIds}
            selectedId={selectedId}
            onExpandedIdsChange={(nextExpandedIds) => {
              void setExpandedIds(nextExpandedIds);
            }}
            onSelectedIdChange={(nodeId) => {
              void selectNode(nodeId);
            }}
          />
        </ChipsLoadingBoundary>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
EOF]
```

```
import type { Client } from "chips-sdk";

export interface CardAst {
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
  structure: Record<string, unknown>;
  contentFiles: string[];
}

export interface CardValidationResult {
  valid: boolean;
  errors: string[];
}

export interface CardRenderView {
  title: string;
  body: string;
  contentFiles: string[];
  target: string;
  semanticHash: string;
}

export interface BoxInspection {
  path: string;
  type: "full" | "shell" | "mixed";
  cards: Array<{ path: string; type: "internal" | "external" }>;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

export interface RuntimeFileStat {
  path: string;
  size: number;
  isFile: boolean;
  isDirectory: boolean;
  mtimeMs: number;
}

export interface RecentWorkspaceTarget {
  path: string;
  kind: "card" | "box";
  title: string;
  openedAt: string;
}

export interface OpenFileDialogOptions {
  title: string;
  allowMultiple?: boolean;
  mustExist?: boolean;
}

export interface EditorRouteService {
  getConfig<T>(key: string): Promise<T | undefined>;
  setConfig<T>(key: string, value: T): Promise<void>;
  openFileDialog(options: OpenFileDialogOptions): Promise<string | null>;
  listFiles(dir: string): Promise<string[]>;
  statFile(path: string): Promise<RuntimeFileStat>;
  parseCard(cardFile: string): Promise<CardAst>;
  validateCard(cardFile: string): Promise<CardValidationResult>;
  renderCardPreview(cardFile: string): Promise<CardRenderView>;
  inspectBox(boxFile: string): Promise<BoxInspection>;
}

export function createEditorRouteService(client: Client): EditorRouteService {
  return {
    async getConfig<T>(key: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ key: string }, { value?: T }>("config.get", { key });
      return result.value;
    },
    async setConfig<T>(key: string, value: T) {
      await client.invoke("config.set", { key, value });
    },
    async openFileDialog(options: OpenFileDialogOptions) {
      const result = await client.invoke<
        {
          options: {
            title: string;
            mode: "file";
            allowMultiple: boolean;
            mustExist: boolean;
          };
        },
        { filePaths: string[] | null }
      >("platform.dialogOpenFile", {
        options: {
          title: options.title,
          mode: "file",
          allowMultiple: options.allowMultiple === true,
          mustExist: options.mustExist !== false,
        },
      });

      return Array.isArray(result.filePaths) && result.filePaths.length > 0 ? result.filePaths[0] : null;
    },
    async listFiles(dir: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ dir: string }, { entries: string[] }>("file.list", { dir });
      return result.entries;
    },
    async statFile(path: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ path: string }, { meta: RuntimeFileStat }>("file.stat", { path });
      return result.meta;
    },
    async parseCard(cardFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ cardFile: string }, { ast: CardAst }>("card.parse", { cardFile });
      return result.ast;
    },
    async validateCard(cardFile: string) {
      return client.invoke<{ cardFile: string }, CardValidationResult>("card.validate", { cardFile });
    },
    async renderCardPreview(cardFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<
        {
          cardFile: string;
          options: {
            target: "card-iframe";
            mode: "preview";
          };
        },
        { view: CardRenderView }
      >("card.render", {
        cardFile,
        options: {
          target: "card-iframe",
          mode: "preview",
        },
      });
      return result.view;
    },
    async inspectBox(boxFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ boxFile: string }, { inspection: BoxInspection }>("box.inspect", { boxFile });
      return result.inspection;
    },
  };
}

cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/shared/runtime/editor-i18n.ts
import enUS from "../../../i18n/en-US.json";
import zhCN from "../../../i18n/zh-CN.json";

export type EditorLocale = "zh-CN" | "en-US";

type MessageTree = Record<string, unknown>;
type TranslatorParams = Record<string, string | number>;

const dictionaries: Record<EditorLocale, MessageTree> = {
  "zh-CN": zhCN,
  "en-US": enUS,
};

function readByPath(source: MessageTree, pathExpression: string): string | null {
  const segments = pathExpression.split(".");
  let current: unknown = source;

  for (const segment of segments) {
    if (!current || typeof current !== "object" || !(segment in current)) {
      return null;
    }
    current = (current as Record<string, unknown>)[segment];
  }

  return typeof current === "string" ? current : null;
}

function interpolate(template: string, params?: TranslatorParams): string {
  if (!params) {
    return template;
  }

  return template.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (token, key: string) => {
    const value = params[key];
    return value === undefined ? token : String(value);
  });
}

export function normalizeLocale(locale: string | null | undefined): EditorLocale {
  if (typeof locale !== "string") {
    return "zh-CN";
  }

  const normalized = locale.toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.startsWith("en")) {
    return "en-US";
  }
  return "zh-CN";
}

export function createTranslator(locale: string) {
  const normalizedLocale = normalizeLocale(locale);

  return (key: string, params?: TranslatorParams): string => {
    const localized = readByPath(dictionaries[normalizedLocale], key);
    if (localized !== null) {
      return interpolate(localized, params);
    }

    const fallback = readByPath(dictionaries["zh-CN"], key);
    return interpolate(fallback ?? key, params);
  };
}
EOF

import React from "react";
import { ChipsThemeProvider } from "@chips/component-library";
import { EditorRuntimeProvider, useThemeProviderState } from "./providers/EditorRuntimeProvider";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "./providers/editor-runtime-context";
import { WorkspaceSessionProvider } from "./providers/WorkspaceSessionProvider";
import { WorkspaceExplorerProvider } from "./providers/WorkspaceExplorerProvider";
import { EditorShell } from "../features/shell/EditorShell";

function EditorShellWithTheme() {
  const { snapshot } = useEditorRuntime();
  const themeState = useThemeProviderState(snapshot);
  const themeEventSource = typeof window !== "undefined" ? (window as Window & { chips?: unknown }).chips : undefined;

  return (
    <ChipsThemeProvider
      themeId={themeState.themeId}
      version={themeState.version}
      eventSource={themeEventSource}
      eventName="theme.changed"
    >
      <EditorShell />
    </ChipsThemeProvider>
  );
}

export function EditorApp() {
  return (
    <EditorRuntimeProvider>
      <WorkspaceSessionProvider>
        <WorkspaceExplorerProvider>
          <EditorShellWithTheme />
        </WorkspaceExplorerProvider>
      </WorkspaceSessionProvider>
    </EditorRuntimeProvider>
  );
}

import React from "react";
import { ChipsButton } from "@chips/component-library";
import { appConfig } from "../../../config/app-config";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
import { useWorkspaceSession } from "../../app/providers/workspace-session-context";
import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
import { WorkspaceExplorerPanel } from "../workspace/WorkspaceExplorerPanel";
import { SettingsCenter } from "../settings/SettingsCenter";
import { getLaunchTargetPath, hasTheme } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";
import { useEditorTranslation } from "../../shared/runtime/use-editor-translation";
import "./editor-shell.css";

function formatCapabilitySummary(capabilities: Record<string, boolean>): string {
  const enabled = Object.values(capabilities).filter(Boolean).length;
  const total = Object.keys(capabilities).length;
  return `${enabled}/${total}`;
}

interface InfoCardProps {
  title: string;
  value: string;
  description: string;
}

function InfoCard({ title, value, description }: InfoCardProps) {
  return (
    <article className="editor-shell__info-card">
      <span className="editor-shell__info-label">{title}</span>
      <strong>{value}</strong>
      <p>{description}</p>
    </article>
  );
}

function DocumentListItem(props: {
  document: WorkspaceDocument;
  active: boolean;
  closeLabel: string;
  onActivate(): void;
  onClose(): void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className={`editor-shell__document-item${props.active ? " editor-shell__document-item--active" : ""}`}>
      <button type="button" className="editor-shell__document-main" onClick={props.onActivate}>
        <strong>{props.document.title}</strong>
        <span>{props.document.path}</span>
      </button>
      <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onClose}>
        {props.closeLabel}
      </ChipsButton>
    </div>
  );
}

function DocumentPreview(props: {
  document: WorkspaceDocument | null;
  translate: ReturnType<typeof useEditorTranslation>;
}) {
  if (!props.document) {
    return <p className="editor-shell__empty-state">{props.translate("editingEngine.preview.empty")}</p>;
  }

  if (props.document.kind === "card") {
    return (
      <iframe
        className="editor-shell__preview-frame"
        title={props.document.preview.title}
        sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-forms"
        srcDoc={props.document.preview.body}
      />
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="editor-shell__box-summary">
      <strong>{props.translate("editingEngine.preview.boxSummaryTitle", { type: props.document.inspection.type })}</strong>
      <p>{props.translate("editingEngine.preview.boxSummaryDescription", { count: props.document.inspection.cards.length })}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

export function EditorShell() {
  const { snapshot, loading, busyAction, error, refresh } = useEditorRuntime();
  const {
    activeDocument,
    activeDocumentId,
    documents,
    recentTargets,
    busy: workspaceBusy,
    error: workspaceError,
    openDocument,
    openDocumentFromDialog,
    activateDocument,
    closeDocument,
    refreshActiveDocument,
  } = useWorkspaceSession();
  const translate = useEditorTranslation(snapshot?.locale);

  if (loading || !snapshot) {
    return (
      <div className="editor-shell editor-shell--centered">
        <div className="editor-shell__loading-card">
          <h1>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingTitle")}</h1>
          <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingDescription")}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const launchTargetPath = appConfig.featureFlags.enableLaunchContextRecovery ? getLaunchTargetPath(snapshot) : null;

  return (
    <div className="editor-shell">
      <header className="editor-shell__header">
        <div className="editor-shell__header-main">
          <span className="editor-shell__eyebrow">{translate("editingEngine.shell.eyebrow")}</span>
          <h1>{snapshot.plugin.name}</h1>
          <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.subtitle")}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="editor-shell__header-actions">
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" disabled={busyAction === "refresh"} onPress={() => void refresh()}>
            {translate("editingEngine.actions.refresh")}
          </ChipsButton>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="editor-shell__grid">
        <section className="editor-shell__panel editor-shell__panel--hero">
          <div className="editor-shell__hero-copy">
            <h2>{translate("editingEngine.shell.heroTitle")}</h2>
            <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.heroDescription")}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="editor-shell__hero-metrics">
            <InfoCard
              title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.layout")}
              value={translate(`editingEngine.layout.${snapshot.preferredLayout === "workbench" ? "workbench" : "infiniteCanvas"}`)}
              description={translate(`editingEngine.layoutDescriptions.${snapshot.preferredLayout === "workbench" ? "workbench" : "infiniteCanvas"}`)}
            />
            <InfoCard
              title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.theme")}
              value={snapshot.theme.displayName}
              description={hasTheme(snapshot, snapshot.theme.themeId)
                ? translate("editingEngine.metrics.themeReady")
                : translate("editingEngine.metrics.themeFallback")}
            />
            <InfoCard
              title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.capabilities")}
              value={formatCapabilitySummary(snapshot.capabilities)}
              description={translate("editingEngine.metrics.capabilitiesDescription")}
            />
          </div>
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.session")}</h2>
          <div className="editor-shell__detail-list">
            <div>
              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.pluginId")}</span>
              <strong>{snapshot.plugin.id}</strong>
            </div>
            <div>
              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.sessionId")}</span>
              <strong>{snapshot.launchContext.sessionId ?? translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</strong>
            </div>
            <div>
              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.launchTarget")}</span>
              <strong>{launchTargetPath ?? translate("editingEngine.values.noLaunchTarget")}</strong>
            </div>
            <div>
              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.platform")}</span>
              <strong>{`${snapshot.platform.os} / ${snapshot.platform.arch}`}</strong>
            </div>
          </div>
          {error ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{error}</p> : null}
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <div className="editor-shell__section-header">
            <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.workspace")}</h2>
            <div className="editor-shell__button-row">
              <ChipsButton
                variant="primary"
                disabled={snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || workspaceBusy}
                onPress={() => void openDocumentFromDialog()}
              >
                {translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
              </ChipsButton>
              <ChipsButton
                variant="secondary"
                disabled={!activeDocument || workspaceBusy}
                onPress={() => void refreshActiveDocument()}
              >
                {translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
              </ChipsButton>
            </div>
          </div>
          {workspaceError ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{workspaceError}</p> : null}
          {activeDocument ? (
            <div className="editor-shell__detail-list">
              <div>
                <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentName")}</span>
                <strong>{activeDocument.title}</strong>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentType")}</span>
                <strong>{translate(`editingEngine.documents.${activeDocument.kind}`)}</strong>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentPath")}</span>
                <strong>{activeDocument.path}</strong>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentStatus")}</span>
                <strong>
                  {activeDocument.kind === "card"
                    ? activeDocument.validation.valid
                      ? translate("editingEngine.documents.valid")
                      : translate("editingEngine.documents.invalid")
                    : translate("editingEngine.documents.boxReady")}
                </strong>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <p className="editor-shell__empty-state">{translate("editingEngine.workspace.empty")}</p>
          )}
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <WorkspaceExplorerPanel />
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.openDocuments")}</h2>
          {documents.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="editor-shell__empty-state">{translate("editingEngine.workspace.noOpenDocuments")}</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="editor-shell__document-list">
              {documents.map((document) => (
                <DocumentListItem
                  key={document.id}
                  document={document}
                  active={document.id === activeDocumentId}
                  closeLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
                  onActivate={() => activateDocument(document.id)}
                  onClose={() => closeDocument(document.id)}
                />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.preview")}</h2>
          <DocumentPreview document={activeDocument} translate={translate} />
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel">
          <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.recentTargets")}</h2>
          {recentTargets.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="editor-shell__empty-state">{translate("editingEngine.workspace.noRecentTargets")}</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="editor-shell__recent-list">
              {recentTargets.map((target) => (
                <button
                  key={target.path}
                  type="button"
                  className="editor-shell__recent-item"
                  onClick={() => void openDocument(target.path)}
                  disabled={workspaceBusy}
                >
                  <strong>{target.title}</strong>
                  <span>{target.path}</span>
                  <em>{translate(`editingEngine.documents.${target.kind}`)}</em>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </section>

        <section className="editor-shell__panel editor-shell__panel--full-width">
          <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.settingsCenter")}</h2>
          <SettingsCenter />
        </section>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { App } from "../../src/App";
import { createTranslator, normalizeLocale } from "../../src/shared/runtime/editor-i18n";
import {
  createBoxWorkspaceDocument,
  createCardWorkspaceDocument,
  detectWorkspaceDocumentKind,
  sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets,
  upsertWorkspaceDocument,
} from "../../src/domains/workspace/workspace-service";
import {
  createFallbackRuntimeSnapshot,
  getLaunchTargetPath,
  getVisibleThemes,
  hasTheme,
} from "../../src/shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";

describe("App (编辑引擎应用壳层)", () => {
  it("应导出可用的 React 组件", () => {
    expect(App).toBeTypeOf("function");
  });
});

describe("editor-i18n", () => {
  it("应归一化 locale、读取词典并支持插值参数", () => {
    expect(normalizeLocale("en")).toBe("en-US");
    expect(normalizeLocale("zh-Hans-CN")).toBe("zh-CN");
    const t = createTranslator("en-US");
    expect(t("editingEngine.layout.workbench")).toBe("Workbench");
    expect(t("editingEngine.preview.boxSummaryDescription", { count: 3 })).toBe("This box contains 3 card references.");
  });
});

describe("workspace-service", () => {
  it("应识别文档类型并更新打开列表", () => {
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.card")).toBe("card");
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.box")).toBe("box");
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.txt")).toBeNull();

    const cardDocument = createCardWorkspaceDocument({
      path: "/tmp/demo.card",
      ast: {
        metadata: { name: "Demo Card" },
        structure: {},
        contentFiles: ["content/a.yaml"],
      },
      validation: {
        valid: true,
        errors: [],
      },
      preview: {
        title: "Demo Card",
        body: "<html></html>",
        contentFiles: [],
        target: "card-iframe",
        semanticHash: "hash-1",
      },
    });

    const boxDocument = createBoxWorkspaceDocument({
      path: "/tmp/demo.box",
      inspection: {
        path: "/tmp/demo.box",
        type: "full",
        cards: [{ path: "a.card", type: "internal" }],
      },
    });

    const documents = upsertWorkspaceDocument([cardDocument], boxDocument);
    expect(documents[0].id).toBe(boxDocument.id);
    expect(sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets([{ path: "/tmp/demo.card", kind: "card", title: "Demo", openedAt: "now" }])).toHaveLength(1);
  });
});

describe("editor-runtime-service helpers", () => {
  it("应解析启动目标路径、主题可见性与预览快照", () => {
    expect(
      getLaunchTargetPath({
        launchContext: {
          launchParams: {
            targetPath: "/tmp/demo.card",
          },
        },
      }),
    ).toBe("/tmp/demo.card");

    const themes = getVisibleThemes([
      { id: "theme-b", displayName: "Beta", version: "1.0.0", isDefault: false },
      { id: "theme-a", displayName: "Alpha", version: "1.0.0", isDefault: true },
    ]);

    expect(themes.map((item) => item.id)).toEqual(["theme-a", "theme-b"]);
    expect(
      hasTheme(
        {
          theme: {
            themeId: "theme-a",
            displayName: "Alpha",
            version: "1.0.0",
          },
          availableThemes: themes,
        },
        "theme-a",
      ),
    ).toBe(true);

    const previewSnapshot = createFallbackRuntimeSnapshot({} as never);
    expect(previewSnapshot.runtimeMode).toBe("preview");
    expect(previewSnapshot.plugin.id).toBe("com.chips.editing-engine");
  });
});
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/tests/unit/workspace-explorer.test.ts
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import {
  buildWorkspaceExplorerRoots,
  buildWorkspaceExplorerTree,
  createWorkspaceExplorerEntry,
  getParentDirectoryPath,
  mergeExpandedDirectoryIds,
  sortWorkspaceExplorerEntries,
} from "../../src/domains/workspace-explorer/workspace-explorer-service";
import { getBuiltinSettingsPanelDefinitions } from "../../src/features/settings/settings-registry";

describe("workspace-explorer-service", () => {
  it("应计算去重后的根目录并保持顺序", () => {
    const roots = buildWorkspaceExplorerRoots({
      documents: [
        { id: "a", path: "/workspace/demo.card", kind: "card", title: "Demo", openedAt: "now", ast: { metadata: {}, structure: {}, contentFiles: [] }, validation: { valid: true, errors: [] }, preview: { title: "Demo", body: "", contentFiles: [], target: "card-iframe", semanticHash: "hash" } },
      ],
      recentTargets: [
        { path: "/workspace/next.box", kind: "box", title: "Next", openedAt: "now" },
        { path: "/workspace/demo.card", kind: "card", title: "Demo", openedAt: "now" },
      ],
      launchTargetPath: "/workspace/final.card",
    });

    expect(roots).toEqual(["/workspace"]);
    expect(getParentDirectoryPath("/workspace/demo.card")).toBe("/workspace");
  });

  it("应过滤非目录与非文档文件，并构造树节点", () => {
    const directoryEntry = createWorkspaceExplorerEntry("/workspace/assets", {
      path: "/workspace/assets",
      size: 0,
      isFile: false,
      isDirectory: true,
      mtimeMs: 1,
    });
    const cardEntry = createWorkspaceExplorerEntry("/workspace/demo.card", {
      path: "/workspace/demo.card",
      size: 0,
      isFile: true,
      isDirectory: false,
      mtimeMs: 1,
    });
    const ignoredEntry = createWorkspaceExplorerEntry("/workspace/readme.txt", {
      path: "/workspace/readme.txt",
      size: 0,
      isFile: true,
      isDirectory: false,
      mtimeMs: 1,
    });

    expect(directoryEntry?.kind).toBe("directory");
    expect(cardEntry?.kind).toBe("card");
    expect(ignoredEntry).toBeNull();

    const sorted = sortWorkspaceExplorerEntries([cardEntry!, directoryEntry!]);
    expect(sorted.map((entry) => entry.kind)).toEqual(["directory", "card"]);

    const tree = buildWorkspaceExplorerTree({
      roots: ["/workspace"],
      expandedIds: mergeExpandedDirectoryIds([], ["/workspace", "/workspace/assets"]),
      directoryEntries: {
        "/workspace": sorted,
        "/workspace/assets": [],
      },
    });

    expect(tree[0]?.children.map((item) => item.path)).toEqual(["/workspace/assets", "/workspace/demo.card"]);
  });
});

describe("settings-registry", () => {
  it("应暴露按顺序排列的内置设置面板定义", () => {
    const definitions = getBuiltinSettingsPanelDefinitions();
    expect(definitions.map((definition) => definition.category.id)).toEqual([
      "workspace",
      "layout",
      "theme",
      "locale",
      "runtime",
    ]);
  });
});
EOF]
```

```
:root {
  color-scheme: light;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--chips-font-sans, "IBM Plex Sans", "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #f7f5ef) 0%, var(--chips-sys-color-canvas, #f2efe7) 100%);
  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #1b1b18);
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

#root {
  min-height: 100vh;
}

.editor-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 28px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 24px;
}

.editor-shell--centered {
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.editor-shell__loading-card,
.editor-shell__panel,
.editor-shell__info-card {
  border-radius: var(--chips-sys-radius-lg, 20px);
  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #fff) 88%, transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.editor-shell__loading-card {
  max-width: 520px;
  padding: 32px;
}

.editor-shell__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
  padding: 8px 0;
  -webkit-app-region: drag;
}

.editor-shell__header-actions,
.editor-shell__header-actions * {
  -webkit-app-region: no-drag;
}

.editor-shell__eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.editor-shell__header h1,
.editor-shell__panel h2,
.editor-shell__hero-copy h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.editor-shell__header p,
.editor-shell__hero-copy p,
.editor-shell__panel p,
.editor-shell__info-card p {
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.editor-shell__section-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: center;
}

.editor-shell__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.15fr 0.85fr;
  gap: 20px;
}

.editor-shell__panel {
  padding: 24px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.editor-shell__panel--full-width {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.editor-shell__panel--hero {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.15fr 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
  align-items: start;
}

.editor-shell__hero-copy {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.editor-shell__hero-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}

.editor-shell__info-card {
  padding: 18px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.editor-shell__info-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.72;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}

.editor-shell__detail-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.editor-shell__detail-list div {
  padding-bottom: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}

.editor-shell__detail-list span {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.68;
}

.editor-shell__document-list,
.editor-shell__recent-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
}

.editor-shell__document-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: var(--chips-sys-radius-md, 14px);
  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.52);
}

.editor-shell__document-item--active {
  border-color: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.32);
  background: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.08);
}

.editor-shell__document-main,
.editor-shell__recent-item {
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 0;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  color: inherit;
}

.editor-shell__document-main span,
.editor-shell__recent-item span,
.editor-shell__recent-item em {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.editor-shell__preview-frame {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 520px;
  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
  border-radius: var(--chips-sys-radius-lg, 20px);
  background: white;
}

.editor-shell__empty-state,
.editor-shell__box-summary {
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: var(--chips-sys-radius-md, 14px);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  border: 1px dashed var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.16));
}

.editor-shell__button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

.editor-shell__error-banner {
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border-radius: var(--chips-sys-radius-md, 14px);
  background: rgba(180, 48, 48, 0.12);
  color: #8f1d1d;
}

@media (max-width: 960px) {
  .editor-shell {
    padding: 20px;
  }

  .editor-shell__header,
  .editor-shell__panel--hero,
  .editor-shell__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .editor-shell__hero-metrics {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
```

```
[bash -lc cat <<'EOF' > /Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/05-工作区资源树与设置注册中心设计.md
# 工作区资源树与设置注册中心设计

> 文档目标：冻结本轮新增两个核心域的职责边界与正式链路，避免后续再次把状态散落回壳层组件。

---

## 1. 工作区资源树

### 1.1 设计目标

- 为工作台布局和后续文件管理器工具窗口提供统一资源树数据源；
- 只展示当前编辑引擎正式关心的目录、`.card`、`.box` 目标；
- 不在前端直接访问 Node 或文件系统私有实现，统一走 Host 正式 route。

### 1.2 根目录来源

`WorkspaceExplorerProvider` 当前按以下优先顺序收集根目录：

1. 当前已打开文档的父目录；
2. 启动上下文 `targetPath` 的父目录；
3. 最近目标列表中的父目录。

根目录会去重并保持稳定顺序，作为资源树的顶层节点集合。

### 1.3 正式接口链路

- 目录枚举：`file.list`
- 元数据获取：`file.stat`
- 文档打开：沿用 `WorkspaceSessionProvider.openDocument()`
- 预览与摘要：沿用 `card.parse` / `card.validate` / `card.render` / `box.inspect`

当前实现位于：

- `src/app/providers/WorkspaceExplorerProvider.tsx`
- `src/domains/workspace-explorer/workspace-explorer-service.ts`
- `src/features/workspace/WorkspaceExplorerPanel.tsx`

### 1.4 状态边界

资源树状态不放在 `EditorShell` 局部，而由独立 Provider 维护：

- 根目录集合；
- 已展开目录；
- 当前选中节点；
- 目录缓存；
- 加载与错误状态。

这样后续文件管理器窗口、工作台左侧树、无限画布附属文件面板都可以复用同一上下文。

---

## 2. 设置注册中心

### 2.1 设计目标

- 沿用旧项目“注册中心”思路，但改为 React + Component Library 实现；
- 把面板目录、顺序、标题和描述集中管理，避免壳层硬编码大量条件分支；
- 为后续新增卡箱库设置、自动保存设置、快捷键设置等分类预留统一入口。

### 2.2 当前内置分类

1. `workspace`
2. `layout`
3. `theme`
4. `locale`
5. `runtime`

定义位于 `src/features/settings/settings-registry.ts`，类型位于 `src/domains/settings/types.ts`。

### 2.3 面板职责

- `workspace`：会话级文件打开与刷新动作、会话统计；
- `layout`：默认布局切换；
- `theme`：主题切换；
- `locale`：语言切换；
- `runtime`：插件、平台、会话摘要。

### 2.4 正式依赖链路

- 布局偏好：`config.get/config.set`
- 主题：`theme.getCurrent/theme.list/theme.apply`
- 多语言：`i18n.getCurrent/i18n.listLocales/i18n.setCurrent`
- 工作区动作：`WorkspaceSessionProvider`

设置中心本身只编排正式 Provider 和 route 适配层，不额外创建第二套主题、多语言或配置系统。

---

## 3. 当前限制与后续延展

### 3.1 已完成边界

- 资源树已经能够作为正式工作区目录浏览入口；
- 设置注册中心已经替代壳层中的临时控制按钮集合；
- 所有新增用户文案已进入项目语言包。

### 3.2 后续扩展点

- 为资源树补齐新建、重命名、删除、导入、导出动作；
- 将设置分类选中态持久化到 `config.*`；
- 把设置注册中心拆分为可供工具窗口复用的独立容器；
- 在编辑面板契约闭环后新增“编辑”分类与自动保存分类。
EOF
```
